channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Turkish student at Tufts University detained, video shows masked people handcuffing her
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — A Turkish national who is a doctoral student at Tufts University has been detained by federal agents without explanation, her lawyer said on Wednesday. Rumeysa Ozturk, 30, had just left her home in Somerville to meet with friends Tuesday night when she was detained by U.S.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, KATHY McCORMACK and MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Measles cases more than double in Kansas
item.description: Kansas is experiencing a measles outbreak with 23 confirmed cases, most of which are in southwest Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Laura McMillan, NewsNation

item.title: The White House security breach raises concerns among some military spouses and veterans
item.description: Some military spouses and veterans are questioning the White House’s handling of security after a journalist was accidentally added to a group chat about military strikes in Yemen.
item.dc:creator: Ben Finley And Allen G. Breed, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rubio visits the Caribbean, where energy and migration will top his agenda this week
item.description: KINGSTON, Jamaica (AP) — Weaning Caribbean countries from their dependence on Venezuelan oil and combating illegal immigration will top U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sudan’s army says it has recaptured Khartoum's airport as it seeks to liberate the capital
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — Sudan's army said Wednesday it had recaptured Khartoum's international airport and a key base of the rival Rapid Support Forces paramilitary group, bringing it closer to regaining full control of the capital for the first time in nearly two years of war.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Education Department restores IDR student loan applications
item.description: The applications were put on pause after a federal appeals court ruled the Biden administration’s Saving on Valuable Education (SAVE) income-drive repayment (IDR) plan was illegal.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KREX 5

item.title: Two dozen Kohl's stores to shutter this weekend, including in California
item.description: Kohl's announced 27 underperforming stores would close before April. The final day for those locations is coming this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Dollar Tree sells Family Dollar for $1 billion
item.description: Dollar Tree has agreed to sell Family Dollar for $1 billion, ending the short-lived merger deal and allowing both companies to focus on their core operations.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, Fox 5

item.title: A year after the Baltimore bridge collapse, a long road to recovery is ahead
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — A year after the catastrophic collapse of Baltimore’s Francis Scott Key Bridge, Maryland leaders are honoring the six construction workers who were killed when the road they were repairing buckled underneath them.
item.dc:creator: LEA SKENE and BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Vance to accompany wife to Greenland amid backlash
item.description: Vance’s announcement adds another layer of tension to an already fraught atmosphere surrounding his wife’s planned visit.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: How the Signal 'group chat' furor has affected the 5 biggest players
item.description: The fact that such inherently sensitive information was being communicated in such a forum — and in front of a reporter whom no other participant appears to have noticed — has caused a political storm.
item.dc:creator: Niall Stanage, Fox 5

item.title: Amanda Knox: Prosecutor who put me in prison still texts me every day
item.description: Amanda Knox, convicted, then acquitted of murder, discusses her time in an Italian prison and what freedom means to her now.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, Fox 5

item.title: Atlantic publishes Trump Cabinet group chat messages
item.description: The Atlantic has published the Signal group chat messages among national security leaders that were inadvertently shared with Editor-in-Chief Jeffrey Goldberg, noting administration officials said Tuesday they were not classified.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KRON4

item.title: Founders of Black-owned brands adapt their hopes and business plans for a post-DEI era
item.description: The Black creators of some consumers products are rethinking their business plans as major U.S. companies end or water down their diversity, equity and inclusion programs.
item.dc:creator: Anne D'Innocenzio, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ICE in Boston nabs previously deported Dominican fentanyl trafficker, child rape convict, murderers
item.description: ICE agents in the Boston area have arrested previously deported fentanyl migrant traffickers, a child rape convict and several migrants wanted for murder.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal judge blocks detention of Columbia anti-Israel protester Yunseo Chung
item.description: Columbia student Yunseo Chung does not have to fear being arrested and deported by ICE for now. A federal judge issued a restraining order preventing authorities from going after Chung.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dollar Tree selling Family Dollar to a pair of private equity firms for $1 billion
item.description: Dollar Tree is selling Family Dollar to a pair of private equity firms for $1 billion after unsuccessfully trying to incorporate the bargain chain for a decade.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN AP Business News, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Perpetual adoration is a growing Catholic trend. A Holy Year event is scheduled for the weekend
item.description: HIALEAH, Fla. (AP) — Twice a week, Luisa Arguello and her husband spend from 2 a.m. to 3 a.m. praying in the perpetual adoration chapel at St. Benedict Catholic Church, tucked on a quiet palm-fringed residential street in the Miami suburb of Hialeah. “Your body clock gets used to it.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: GOP-led states push for control of school aid as Trump promises a smaller federal role in education
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Governors in several Republican-led states are pressing the Trump administration to cut strings attached to their federal education money, a goal conservatives have long dreamed of that now appears within reach as President Donald Trump moves to dismantle the Education Department.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: More states move to ban cellphones in school as Georgia is latest to act
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — More states are moving to ban or restrict cellphones in school, a trend that continues to win bipartisan support in legislatures.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The US Postal Service has been struggling for years. Now Trump's talking about privatizing it
item.description: The U.S. Postal Service is facing an uncertain future after the resignation this week of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy and the suggestion by President Donald Trump and Elon Musk, who heads the Department of Government Efficiency, that the mail service could be privatized.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump orders declassification of FBI’s Russia investigation
item.description: President Trump on Tuesday signed a memorandum directing the declassification of FBI files related to the investigation into his 2016 campaign's potential ties to Russia.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mega Millions is about to change: 7 things to know
item.description: Frequently play the Mega Millions? The national lottery jackpot game is about to be overhauled with the promise of bigger prizes, better odds and faster-growing jackpots — if you don't mind paying a higher ticket price.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: FBI launches Tesla vandalism task force
item.description: The FBI confirmed Monday it has established a task force to investigate the wave of vandalism and arson incidents targeting Tesla in recent weeks.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Student returns lost backpack filled with luxury jewelry, diamonds, cash
item.description: Amid the fog of international travel, a group of Jewish students studying in Jerusalem was handed a backpack -- that none recognized as their own.
item.dc:creator: Anthony DiLorenzo, Fox 5

item.title: Mega Millions is changing: 7 things to know before April's price change, game overhaul
item.description: More expensive tickets, faster-growing jackpots, and a built-in multiplier — here's what to expect when Mega Millions gets overhauled next month.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Michigan couple held in Mexican prison, daughter says
item.description: They couple was arrested on March 4 at an airport in Cancun and have been held without bond for 21 days, the daughter claims.
item.dc:creator: Taryn Simmons, KRON4

item.title: US infrastructure improved with Biden-era spending but there's a long way to go
item.description: A report card on the upkeep of America's infrastructure gave it a “C” grade on Tuesday, up slightly from previous years.
item.dc:creator: TAMMY WEBBER and MICHAEL PHILLIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fired federal workers face choices now that a judge wants them rehired
item.description: Sam Peterson is one of thousands of fired federal workers who was offered his job back under a judge’s order, but he didn’t jump at the chance to go back to his park ranger position at Washington state’s Lake Roosevelt National Recreation Area.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Live updates: Ratcliffe, Gabbard pressed on war plans Signal group chat
item.description: The Trump administration is scrambling to contain the fallout from a bombshell Atlantic article revealing its editor-in-chief had been mistakenly included in a Signal group chat involving national security adviser Mike Waltz, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, intelligence leadership and other Trump ad
item.dc:creator: The Hill staff, Fox 5

item.title: Couple held at Mexico jail after allegedly defrauding Cancun hotel out of more than $100K
item.description: This story has been updated with additional information. LANSING, Mich. (WLNS) — Paul and Christy Akeo, a couple from Spring Arbor in Jackson County, are currently being held in a maximum-security Mexican prison, their family tells 6 News.
item.dc:creator: Taryn Simmons, WFLA, NBC

item.title: California AG warns 23andMe users to delete their data
item.description: The genetic testing company has the genetic data of more than15 million customers — and California Attorney General Rob Bonta has advised users to purge their data.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Police: Third person arrested in New Mexico shooting that killed 3, injured 15
item.description: A second teenager has been arrested following a deadly shooting at a New Mexico park, marking the third person taken into custody as part of the investigation.
item.dc:creator: Dave Burge, ABC 4
